text: A DoS (Declaration of Security) is required when:

options.text: The ship is entering a dry dock area
When port and ship are not on the same security level
A crew member changes their contract status

explanation: A Declaration of Security (DoS) is typically required under the ISPS Code when a ship is interfacing with a port facility or another ship, and one party is at a higher security level than the other. It ensures that appropriate security measures are agreed upon and maintained to address the heightened risk.
